prompt: Review PR #4470 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds async Kafka cluster ID fetching to the confluent-kafka-go integration for Data Streams Monitoring.

assertions.text: Flags SetClusterID as exported when it should be unexported (internal-only function using public naming)
Notes startClusterIDFetch is duplicated across kafka.v2 and kafka packages
Suggests atomic.Value instead of sync.RWMutex for the write-once clusterID field
Notes that context.Canceled (or DeadlineExceeded) from expected shutdown/timeout should not produce warning logs
Flags that the warn message should describe what the user loses (missing cluster_id in DSM)
